query: SELECT drawNumber, drawTime FROM draw_records WHERE drawTime LIKE '%23:5%' OR drawTime LIKE '%00:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%01:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%02:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%03:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%04:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%05:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%06:%' ORDER BY drawTime DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3EvX9rH8vJHs1LE.34486a3ccb4b --database kTdJcS62GUwid3zgDEGkMA --execute SELECT drawNumber, drawTime FROM draw_records WHERE drawTime LIKE '%23:5%' OR drawTime LIKE '%00:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%01:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%02:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%03:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%04:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%05:%' OR drawTime LIKE '%06:%' ORDER BY drawTime DESC;
